meta.title: Pt 1 Eve Spaceplane "Pants Destroyer" development
meta.description:
The initial development, build and testing of our multistage Eve spaceplane the "Pants Destroyer". We achieved a successful entry, decent and landing (after way too much trial and error) and had a successful accent as well! We're ready to push onwards. Full dress rehearsal run next!

Show your support by visiting http://patreon.com/everydayastronaut

Streamed live on http://Twitch.tv/everydayastronaut on 1/3/2017

Instagram @EverydayAstronaut - http://instagram.com/everydayastronaut
